revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24618454543|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Arai-jinja (Nantan)]][[ja:荒井神社 (南丹市)]] {{Expand Japanese|荒井神社 (南丹市)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Arai Shrine (Nantan) | native_name = 荒井神社 (南丹市) | image = Arai-jinja (Nantan) honden.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Arai Shrine (Nantan) | coordinates = {{coord|35.09693|135.506369}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Arai Shrine (Nantan)'''|荒井神社 (南丹市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tanba Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Kokushi genzaisha|lt=kokushi genzaisha|en|Kokushi genzaisha|fr|Kokushi genzaisha|ja|国史見在社|simple|Kokushi genzaisha|qid=Q118304363|1=Kokushi genzaisha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Tanba Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Tanba Province|ja|Shikinaisha in Tanba Province一覧|qid=Q11368560|1=List of Shikinaisha in Tanba Province}} ** Series ordinal: 23 ** P155: {{ill|Q135040503|ltq=Q135040503|qid=Q135040503|1=Itsushinokanoisoheno Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Hatahisa Shrine|lt=Hatahisa Shrine|ja|幡日佐神社|qid=Q11481867|1=Hatahisa Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q170421|ltq=Q170421|qid=Q170421|1=Nantan, Kyoto}} * {{ill|Q954511|ltq=Q954511|qid=Q954511|1=Tanba Province}} * {{ill|Funai District, Kyoto|lt=Funai district|ceb|Funai-gun|en|Funai District, Kyoto|es|Distrito de Funai|fa|شهرستان فونای، کیوتو|fr|District de Funai|id|Distrik Funai, Kyōto|it|Distretto di Funai|ja|船井郡|ko|후나이군|pl|Powiat Funai|uk|Повіт Фунай|zh_yue|船井郡|zh|船井郡|qid=Q1078679|1=Funai District, Kyoto}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.09693|135.506369}} == image (P18) == * Arai-jinja (Nantan) honden.JPG == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Q1052981|ltq=Q1052981|qid=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 182504 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Son-sha|lt=Son-sha|ja|村社|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8130005007433 == Commons category (P373) == * Arai-jinja (Nantan) == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '京都府南丹市八木町美里荒井1', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Arai-jinja (Nantan)}} [[JA:荒井神社 (南丹市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11618386}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Arai Shrine |Image = [[File:Arai-jinja (Nantan) honden.JPG|270px]]
Protective structure over the main hall (Kyoto City–designated Tangible Cultural Property) |Location = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|qid=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nantan City|Q170421|qid=Q170421|1=Nantan, Kyoto}} Yagi-chō Misato Arai 1 |Coordinates = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|5|49.07|N|135|30|23.38|E|display=ti}} |Deity = |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor) {{ill|lt=candidate shrine|Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
Former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Established = Unknown |Main hall = One-bay {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} with {{ill|lt=hiwada-buki|Q90373477|qid=Q90373477|1=cypress bark roof}} (cypress bark roofing) |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites = |Annual festival = |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Arai Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[File:Arai-jinja (Nantan) torii.JPG|thumb|right|200px|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Arai Shrine''' (あらいじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Yagi-chō Misato, {{ill|lt=Nantan City|Q170421|qid=Q170421|1=Nantan, Kyoto}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|qid=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} {{ill|lt=candidate shrine|Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}, and under the {{ill|lt=modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} it was classified as a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === * Aramitama-no-kami There is also a theory that the enshrined deity is {{ill|lt=Umashimaji|Q10946169|qid=Q10946169|lt=Umashimaji-no-Mikoto|1=Umashimaji}}, the ancestral deity of the Mononobe clan.“Place Names of Kyoto Prefecture,” entry on Arai Shrine. === History === The date of establishment is unknown. In the entry for the 9th day of the 10th month of {{ill|lt=Gangyō|Q747451|qid=Q747451|1=Gangyō}} 6 ({{ill|lt=882|Q23824|qid=Q23824|1=882}}) in the '{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|qid=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}', there is a record of the Arai deity of Tanba Province being granted the Junior Fifth Rank, confirming the shrine’s existence at that time. Because the shrine is an old shrine within the district and because the area was formerly called “Shima-gō,” it is regarded as a {{ill|lt=candidate shrine|Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} for the Shikinaisha “{{ill|lt=Tanba Province|Q954511|qid=Q954511|1=Tanba Province}} {{ill|lt=Funai District|Q1078679|qid=Q1078679|1=Funai District, Kyoto}} Shima Mononobe Shrine” listed in the '{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}' from the mid-{{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|qid=Q193292|1=Heian period}}.Note that the 'Tanba Shisō Senki' identifies it with the Shikinaisha “Shitahi Shrine” in the same district (“Place Names of Kyoto Prefecture,” entry on Arai Shrine). Adjacent to the shrine is Saikō-ji Temple, and until the {{ill|lt=separation of Shinto and Buddhism|Q1970535|qid=Q1970535|1=Shinbutsu bunri}}, the shrine had no Shinto priests; monks from Saikō-ji performed the rites.[https://tanbarakuichi.sakura.ne.jp/shrine/yagi/01.html#y004 Arai Shrine] ([https://tanbarakuichi.sakura.ne.jp/shrine/index.html Shrines of Tanba] [personal website]) Construction or repairs were carried out in {{ill|lt=Eishō|Q1193577|qid=Q1193577|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} 16 ({{ill|lt=1519|Q6278|qid=Q6278|1=1519}}), {{ill|lt=Eiroku|Q1143341|qid=Q1143341|1=Eiroku}} 9 ({{ill|lt=1566|Q6638|qid=Q6638|1=1566}}), and {{ill|lt=Meireki|Q1192766|qid=Q1192766|1=Meireki}} 3 ({{ill|lt=1657|Q6987|qid=Q6987|1=1657}}), and the ridge plaques from those times still survive. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|qid=Q7757|1=1873}}), under the {{ill|lt=modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}, it was designated a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Grounds === * Main hall — Believed to date from the late {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|qid=Q334845|1=Muromachi period}}. One-bay {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} with {{ill|lt=hiwada-buki|Q90373477|qid=Q90373477|1=cypress bark roof}}. Designated a Tangible Cultural Property of Kyoto Prefecture. === Cultural properties === === Kyoto Prefecture–designated cultural properties === * Tangible Cultural Property ** Arai Shrine Main Hall (with one protective structure and two ridge plaques) — Designated on March 24, 2023 (Reiwa 5).From the Kyoto Prefecture Official Gazette dated March 24, 2023, Kyoto Prefectural Board of Education Notification No. 2 (link to the Kyoto Prefecture website). Before being designated as a Kyoto Prefecture–designated Tangible Cultural Property, the main hall was registered as a Kyoto Prefecture Registered Tangible Cultural Property in 1988 (Shōwa 63) and designated as a Yagi Town Tangible Cultural Property (later Nantan City Tangible Cultural Property) in 1985 (Shōwa 60). === Local information === ; Address * {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|qid=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nantan City|Q170421|qid=Q170421|1=Nantan, Kyoto}} Yagi-chō Misato Arai 1 ; Access * Railway: {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|qid=Q502125|lt=JR West|1=West Japan Railway Company}} {{ill|lt=Sagano Line|Q1073011|qid=Q1073011|1=Sagano Line}} {{ill|lt=Yoshitomi Station (Kyoto Prefecture)|Q1044085|qid=Q1044085|lt=Yoshitomi Station|1=Yoshitomi Station (Kyoto)}} (about a 15-minute walk) ; Nearby * Saikō-ji Temple — adjacent === Notes === {{Footnotes help}} {{reflist}} === References === * “Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei: Place Names of Kyoto Prefecture” ({{ill|lt=Heibonsha|Q11482108|qid=Q11482108|1=Heibonsha}}), entry on Arai Shrine, Funai District === External links === {{Commons|Category:Arai-jinja (Nantan)}} * [https://tanbarakuichi.sakura.ne.jp/nantan/sightseeing/sightseeing04.html#araijinja Arai Shrine] — Nantan Life: Nantan City Comprehensive Guide {{Shinto nav}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Arai Shrine (Nantan)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Arai Shrine (Nantan)]][[Category:kokushi genzaisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tanba Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Nantan, Kyoto]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tanba Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nantan, Kyoto]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]]
